Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Maharaj under the Government Decision with reference to the Department of Revenue
Samadhan Camp Campaign - Phase No. 1 Implementation of the mission will be more effective, people-oriented,
To be efficient and efficient. State Level Committee headed by the Minister (Revenue)
It was arranged. The committee is vacant with the retirement of its member, Mr. Sanjay Kenekar.
The Members of the Legislative Council who took office were Shri Pravin Darekar, Smt. Nilam Gorhe, Shri Sunil Karjatkar,
Mr. Sanjay Bhende, Mr. Pramod Jathar, Mrs. Pragya Satav and Mrs. Madhavi Naik
The government was considering reconstituting the committee by making it a state-level committee.
Also Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Maharaj Maharaj Samadhan Shivir Abhiyan - Phase No. 1 or 1.
To make the implementation of the Mission more effective, people-oriented, efficient and dynamic. the Minister
The members of the committee constituted under the chairmanship of (Revenue) shall be appointed district-wise.
Mr. Vikrant Patil, Member of the State Level Committee and Declared as In-charge, Statement
The issue of appointing council members as state coordinators was under the consideration of the government.
Accordingly, the government is taking the following decisions.
The Government's Decisions:
Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Maharaj Maharaj Samadhan Shivir Abhiyan - Phase No. 1 or 1.
To make the implementation of the Mission more effective, people-oriented, efficient and dynamic. the Minister
Members of the State Level Committee constituted under the Chairmanship of (Revenue)
The posts vacated by the retirement of Shri Sanjay Kenekar are held by Shri Pravin Darekar, Smt. The blue bulls,
Mr. Sunil Karjatkar, Mr. Sanjay Bhende, Mr. Pramod Jathar, Mrs. Pragya Satav and Mrs. Madhavi
The committee was reconstituted by including Naik, a member of the Legislative Council, in the state level committee.
The following is being done.
